# Event categories

Documented Intervals.icu calendar event categories from the public OpenAPI `Event.category` / `EventEx.category` enum. icuvisor preserves and passes through custom upstream category values; this resource documents the known enum, not a validation allow-list.

| Category | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `WORKOUT` | Planned workout or training session on the athlete calendar. |
| `RACE_A` | Highest-priority race or A goal event. |
| `RACE_B` | Secondary-priority race or B goal event. |
| `RACE_C` | Lower-priority race or C goal event. |
| `NOTE` | Calendar note or general annotation. |
| `PLAN` | Training-plan marker or plan-level calendar entry. |
| `HOLIDAY` | Holiday or planned time away from normal training. |
| `SICK` | Illness marker affecting training availability. |
| `INJURED` | Injury marker affecting training availability. |
| `SET_EFTP` | Fitness-model event that sets estimated FTP. |
| `FITNESS_DAYS` | Fitness-model event that adjusts modeled fitness days. |
| `SEASON_START` | Season start marker used by planning and fitness views. |
| `TARGET` | Target event or goal marker. |
| `SET_FITNESS` | Fitness-model event that sets modeled fitness. |
